title: lonchocarpus guatemalensis var. proteranthus
intro: Lonchocarpus guatemalensis var. proteranthus, also known as the Guatemalan tree, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of the Lonchocarpus guatemalensis var. proteranthus include pain relief, wound healing, and the treatment of fever, as well as its potential anti-cancer and antimicrobial effects. In traditional medicine, the seeds are often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and are used to treat various ailments, showcasing its versatility as a medicinal plant.
